title: bromopsis exaltata
intro: Bromopsis exaltata, also known as Mountain Brome, is a perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Bromopsis exaltata include treating colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate coughs. The herbal preparations of Bromopsis exaltata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
